title: VPN for Streaming 2026: Which VPNs Actually Unblock Netflix, Disney+, and BBC iPlayer
description: Streaming services actively block VPN IP ranges. Only a handful of VPNs reliably unblock major platforms in 2026. Here is the current state and which services work.
content:
Why Streaming Is Hard for VPNs

Netflix, Disney+, and BBC iPlayer maintain lists of known VPN server IP addresses and block them. When a VPN server IP gets flagged, users on that server see an error instead of content. VPN providers respond by rotating server IPs frequently. It is an arms race, and some VPNs win it more consistently than others.

Which VPNs Reliably Unblock Streaming in 2026

ExpressVPN maintains the widest streaming compatibility: Netflix US, UK, and other regions, Disney+, BBC iPlayer, and most major platforms. It is expensive but consistent. NordVPN's SmartPlay feature works well for Netflix and is often the first choice for budget-conscious streamers. Surfshark offers good value with consistent Netflix performance. Proton VPN's paid tiers reliably unblock BBC iPlayer and Netflix UK from European servers.

Free VPNs and Streaming

Free VPN tiers almost never unblock streaming. Streaming services prioritize blocking free server pools because they have high traffic volume and static IPs. Paid VPN servers are rotated faster, making them harder to block. If streaming is your primary use case, a paid tier is the only realistic option.

Speed Matters

Streaming requires consistent bandwidth, not just unblocking. 4K content needs 25 Mbps. A VPN that unblocks Netflix but throttles speed to 10 Mbps makes 4K unwatchable. Test server speed on your chosen VPN before committing to a year subscription.
